mean_cn: n.木材；木料制材；  v.伐木；缓慢地移动；拖累，迫使担负
mean_en: trees that are grown to be used in building or for making things; wood that is prepared for use in building, etc.; a long heavy piece of wood used in building a house or ship
sentence: We will need a lot of lumber to build our house.
sentence_trans: 我们需要大量的木材来建造我们的房子。
